column11: Hi Sandy. I have a quick question. can i see anywhere in cinnox system the invoices for my payments? My local tax advisor in Hong Kong asked me to provide invoices, he does not accept the emails with the payment confirmations. he needs a proper invoice to deduct the costs from my expense account...
Let me ask the team to generate it
which email shall I send it to?
the registered email to my account is fine
Sure. It's break time now, I will ask my colleague to process this afterwards. I will send it to you before 3pm UTC+8
that would be great coz its quite urgent to finalise the end of the year bookkeeping
The invoices have been sent to you :)
